name: HorizonBooks Analytics Pipeline
description: End-to-end data pipeline for HorizonBooks using a 3-Lakehouse Medallion Architecture (BronzeLH → SilverLH → GoldLH): ingestion via 3 DataFlow Gen2 items, transformation through 4 Spark notebooks, orchestration via Data Pipeline, forecasting, and analytics via Direct Lake Semantic Model and Power BI Report.

tasks.name: Ingest CSV Data
tasks.description: Load 17 CSV files (Finance: 4, HR: 5, Operations: 8) into BronzeLH using 3 DataFlow Gen2 items (DF_Finance, DF_HR, DF_Operations) running in parallel.

tasks.name: Store Raw Data in BronzeLH
tasks.description: Store ingested CSV data in BronzeLH Lakehouse Files/ area as the raw Bronze layer of the Medallion Architecture.

tasks.name: Transform Bronze to Silver
tasks.description: Clean, validate, deduplicate, and transform raw data from BronzeLH to SilverLH using NB01_BronzeToSilver notebook. Output organized into schemas: finance, hr, operations.

tasks.name: Enrich with Web Data
tasks.description: Enrich Silver data with external web sources (book covers, ISBNs) in SilverLH web schema using NB02_WebEnrichment notebook.

tasks.name: Transform Silver to Gold
tasks.description: Build star schema (10 Dimension + 8 Fact tables) in GoldLH across dim, fact, and analytics schemas using NB03_SilverToGold notebook.

tasks.name: Generate Forecasts
tasks.description: Produce 5 forecast tables (Sales Revenue, Genre Demand, Financial, Inventory Demand, Workforce) in GoldLH analytics schema using NB04_Forecasting notebook.

tasks.name: Store Gold Analytics Data
tasks.description: Persist final star schema (23 tables across dim/fact/analytics schemas) in GoldLH Lakehouse with SQL endpoint for Direct Lake consumption.

tasks.name: Execute SQL Setup
tasks.description: Run CreateTables.sql and GenerateDateDimension.sql on GoldLH to create DimDate and supplementary Gold tables via SQL endpoint.

tasks.name: Orchestrate Pipeline
tasks.description: Coordinate end-to-end execution via PL_HorizonBooks_Orchestration: 3 DataFlows (parallel) → NB01 → NB02 → NB03 → NB04 (sequential).

tasks.name: Build Semantic Model
tasks.description: Deploy HorizonBooksModel Semantic Model (Direct Lake on GoldLH SQL endpoint) with 23 tables, 27 relationships, and 96 DAX measures using TMDL definition.

tasks.name: Visualize & Analyze
tasks.description: Deploy HorizonBooksAnalytics Power BI Report (PBIR, 10 pages) bound to the Semantic Model for interactive analytics and dashboards.

tasks.name: Enable AI Exploration
tasks.description: Deploy HorizonBooks DataAgent for natural-language data exploration over the Semantic Model (requires F64+ capacity).
